prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm directional light falls across the open palms and the bearded face above, with deep brown shadow behind; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
A close devotional portrait of a bearded figure with long hair, set high in the frame, looking directly out with calm gravity. Below the face, two open hands are raised palms-out before a white robe, and a small dark nail-scar is set in each palm. The white drapery falls below the forearms into shadow. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the bearded face high in the frame, the two open palms raised before the white robe.

Cut to close-up — the calm bearded face, long hair, steady direct gaze.

Cut to mid framing — both open palms raised before the white drapery.

Cut to insert — the right palm and the small dark nail-scar set in it.

Cut to insert — the left palm and the small dark nail-scar set in it.

Cut to macro detail — a single nail-mark, the painted shadow within the palm.

Cut to lower framing — the white robe folds and forearms falling into shadow.

Return to full composition — the face above, both scarred palms raised.

End hold on the two open scarred palms.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Reverent wonder — the marks that remain.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
